name: xeno-mini-crm
description: AI-Native Mini CRM for D2C brands — monorepo with Next.js CRM + Express Channel Service

scripts.dev: concurrently -n CRM,CHANNEL -c blue,green "npm run dev:crm" "npm run dev:channel"
scripts.db:migrate: cd crm && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:push: cd crm && npx prisma db push
scripts.db:seed: cd crm && npx prisma db seed
scripts.install:all: cd crm && npm install && cd ../channel-service && npm install
